vw_order_full.description: 주문/결제/고객/상품/판매자를 통합한 Semantic Flat View. Text2SQL 질의의 기본 대상 테이블.

columns.customer_state: 고객 거주 주(state) 코드. 예: SP=상파울루
columns.category_name_en: 영문 상품 카테고리명. 예: electronics, furniture

fact_orders.description: 주문 팩트 테이블. vw_order_full로 조회 불가한 경우에만 사용.

sample_questions.question: 결제수단별 평균 결제금액은?
sample_questions.sql: SELECT payment_type, ROUND(AVG(payment_value), 0) as avg_value FROM vw_order_full GROUP BY payment_type ORDER BY avg_value DESC

sample_questions.question: 지역별 평균 배송일은?
sample_questions.sql: SELECT region_group, ROUND(AVG(delivery_days), 1) as avg_days FROM vw_order_full WHERE delivery_days IS NOT NULL GROUP BY region_group ORDER BY avg_days DESC

sample_questions.question: 배송 지연된 주문의 평균 리뷰 점수는?
sample_questions.sql: SELECT is_delayed, ROUND(AVG(review_score), 2) as avg_score FROM vw_order_full WHERE review_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY is_delayed

sample_questions.question: 캠페인별 전환율은?
sample_questions.sql: SELECT campaign_type, ROUND(AVG(converted)*100, 1) as cvr_pct FROM vw_order_full GROUP BY campaign_type ORDER BY cvr_pct DESC

sample_questions.question: Southeast 지역에서 가장 많이 팔린 카테고리 Top 5는?
sample_questions.sql: SELECT category_name_en, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM vw_order_full WHERE region_group = 'Southeast' GROUP BY category_name_en ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 5
